Name: insert_departments_one
SQL: WITH check_mutation_result AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::numeric AS "budget", $2::text AS "description", $3::uuid AS "id", $4::text AS "name") AS data WHERE true), mutation_result AS (INSERT INTO "public"."departments" ("budget", "description", "id", "name") SELECT check_mutation_result."budget", check_mutation_result."description", check_mutation_result."id", check_mutation_result."name" FROM check_mutation_result RETURNING *), check_nested_employees AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $5::text AS "role", $6::uuid AS "user_id" UNION ALL SELECT $7::text AS "role", $8::uuid AS "user_id") AS data WHERE true), nested_employees AS (INSERT INTO "public"."user_departments" ("role", "user_id", "department_id") SELECT check_nested_employees."role", check_nested_employees."user_id", mutation_result."id" FROM check_nested_employees, mutation_result RETURNING *) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id") AS "_e")) FROM mutation_result
